name: IRD official example - HK$480,000 single
description: Matches the IRD PAM39 guide example: monthly salary HK$40,000, annual HK$480,000. MPF capped at HK$18,000. Progressive tax = HK$38,100.

sources.description: IRD PAM39 Guide worked example Q1/Q2: Income 480000, MPF 18000, Net income 462000, Basic allowance 132000, NCI 330000. Progressive: first 200000 = 16000, remainder 130000 * 17% = 22100, total = 38100. Standard: 462000 * 15% = 69300. Tax = 38100 (progressive lower).
